title: PCA Numeric Embedding Projection
objective: Visualize numeric feature structure and cohort/class overlap in two principal components.
method: Imputed/scaled numeric predictors and generated a two-component PCA projection colored by disease status.
results: PC1 explains 33.10% and PC2 explains 20.04% of scaled numeric variance.
warnings: Missing values and site-level sampling differences may affect all estimates.
PCA uses only numeric variables and therefore omits major categorical predictors such as chest pain type.
